displayLevelPolicy.decision: All 283 structures remain at displayLevel 0 and defaultVisible=true.
displayLevelPolicy.rationale: The Allen source is a single integer-label parcellation in which each voxel has one of 141 labels. Broad parent-like names are generally complementary remainder labels, not duplicate aggregate shells. Hiding apparent components would create anatomical gaps. Semantic aggregate/component-looking names are flagged for review rather than suppressed.
displayLevelPolicy.performanceNote: Use system/occlusion visibility and the mobile GLB tier to reduce draw calls; displayLevel is not a performance LOD in this manifest.

classificationPolicy.note: This is a visualization taxonomy, not a replacement for the Allen ontology. Reviewed overrides place paracingulate cortex with cortex and hypothalamic/pretectal regions with diencephalon. Remaining ambiguous assignments are explicitly marked in node extras.

extras.questionableNote: Assigned to limbic; could be presented as olfactory system or forebrain-other.
Assigned to limbic; could be grouped with olfactory cortex.
Assigned to limbic; it can also be treated as olfactory allocortex.
